title: Kill Them All and Come Back Alone
writer: Tito Carpi, Enzo G. Castellari, Francesco Scardamaglia
actors: Chuck Connors, Frank Wolff, Franco Citti
plot: A mercenary and his five-man team of oddball cutthroats are tasked by a treacherous Confederate spy with infiltrating a Union Army fortress and stealing $1 million in gold.
